title: 12 Pcs Set Christmas Placemats, Christmas Place Mats 6 And Coasters，Christmas Table Mats, Christmas Placemats Sets Of 6, Christmas Dinner Table Decorations, Christmas Place Mats (Red)
features: 🎅🏼You Will Recieve --- 6 PCS Christmas Placemats, 6 PCS Christmas Coasters which can be used together to meet the needs of 6 people, ideal for families, restaurants, hotels and cafes.

🎅🏼Perfect Supplement---The Christmas themed pattern will perfectly match the atmosphere of Christmas dinner, the classic elegance in grey colour looks brilliant. The combination of coasters and placemats will also brighten up the table and makes for a pleasant Christmas meal.

🎅🏼Easy to Clean --- The Christmas placemats are very easy to clean and will not fade, will not mildew and will dry quickly. Stains can be wiped off with a damp cloth or rinsed with water and can be saved and reused until next Christmas!
🎅🏼High Quality --- Christmas Placemats uses high quality PVC material,waterproof,resistant to dirt and heat,durable and reusable,can be rolled up and stored.
🎅🏼Protect the Table --- Our Christmas Table Mats can be placed underneath hot plates,cups,bowls or other utensils on the table,can keep your tables away from heat or scratching.
